name: @heorot/desktop
author: Heorot
description: Electron desktop wrapper for Heorot Web

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n WEB,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:mac:x64:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.mac-unsigned.json --publish never -m dmg zip --x64
scripts.dist:mac:arm64:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.mac-unsigned.json --publish never -m dmg zip --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:universal:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.mac-unsigned.json --publish never -m dmg zip --universal
scripts.dist:mac:x64:signed: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never -m dmg zip --x64
scripts.dist:mac:arm64:signed: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never -m dmg zip --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:universal:signed: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never -m dmg zip --universal
